_meta.description: Persistent living knowledge for the Environmental Risks & Planetary Boundaries monitor (GERP). Carries forward planetary boundary statuses, tipping system flags, standing legal and finance trackers, attribution gap cases, and regional cascade chains across weekly issues.

tipping_system_flags.proxy_value: Three consecutive anomaly weeks as of 2026-03-29

version_history.change: Initial baseline established at High — three consecutive anomaly weeks

tipping_system_flags.proxy_value: 1.4 km/year (IceSat-2 January 2026) — exceeds IPCC AR6 upper projection bound

version_history.change: Initial baseline established at Critical — exceeds IPCC projection

tipping_system_flags.proxy_metric: Vegetation greenness anomaly and deforestation extent
tipping_system_flags.proxy_value: 14% below 2001–2020 baseline across 450,000 km²; ~19% total deforestation

version_history.change: Initial baseline established at High — approaching 25% deforestation threshold

tipping_system_flags.proxy_metric: Atmospheric CH₄ concentration and thermokarst expansion
tipping_system_flags.proxy_value: CH₄ at 1923 ppb; Siberian thermokarst expansion ongoing; carbon pool revised to 1,700 Gt C

tipping_system_flags.proxy_metric: NOAA Coral Reef Watch bleaching alert level
tipping_system_flags.proxy_value: Alert Level 2 — fourth global mass bleaching event in progress; >50% of reefs affected

version_history.change: Initial baseline established at Critical — fourth global bleaching event confirmed

icj_climate_advisory.last_development: Oral hearings concluded December 2024. Written submissions phase ongoing. Advisory opinion expected 2025–2026.

loss_damage_finance.gap: 100% — no disbursements confirmed as of Q1 2026

version_history.change: Initial baseline established — $0 disbursed of $661M committed

active_attribution_gap_cases.description: 140,000+ synthetic chemicals released; <3,000 tested for toxicity. No binding international governance framework.
ISA failed to finalise exploitation regulations by 2023 deadline. Applications in review. No baseline monitoring of benthic ecosystems prior to extraction.

active_attribution_gap_cases.case: Atmospheric Aerosol Loading — Shipping Fuel Transition
active_attribution_gap_cases.description: IMO 2020 sulphur cap reducing aerosol masking effect; no liability mechanism for accelerated warming attributable to aerosol reduction.

active_attribution_gap_cases.case: Coral Reef Bleaching — No International Liability Framework
active_attribution_gap_cases.description: Fourth global mass bleaching event in progress. No binding international liability framework for bleaching losses attributable to state emissions.

regional_cascade_chains.chain: Freshwater depletion → food insecurity → displacement → political instability
regional_cascade_chains.reverse_cascade: Armed conflict in Sudan/Mali blocking adaptation investment — confirmed

version_history.reason: Inaugural issue; FEWS NET Q1 2026 data

regional_cascade_chains.chain: Glacial retreat → seasonal water stress → agricultural productivity loss → political instability
regional_cascade_chains.reverse_cascade: India–Pakistan nuclear posture increasing Himalayan wildfire/disruption risk — assessed moderate

regional_cascade_chains.chain: Sea ice loss → new maritime access → resource competition → governance vacuum → geopolitical escalation
regional_cascade_chains.reverse_cascade: Russian Arctic resource extraction directly accelerating climate forcing — confirmed
